ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the expense */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year of the expense */,
  "estimated_expense" REAL /* Estimated expense amount for the category and academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the expense entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the expense entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the expense entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "academic_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2008-2009, 2009-2010) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "current_year" INTEGER /* Whether the academic year is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, financial analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., view_expenses, edit_expenses, delete_expenses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_changes" (
  "percentage_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage change entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the expense */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year of the expense */,
  "previous_academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous academic year for calculating percentage changes */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in expense between consecutive academic years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_previous_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategory_expenses" (
  "subcategory_expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory expense entry */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the expense */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year of the expense */,
  "estimated_expense" REAL /* Estimated expense amount for the subcategory and academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory expense entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory expense entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the subcategory expense entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the subcategory expense entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_expenses_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_expenses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_expenses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_expenses_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)
